name: p1_ops_f64
drl:
rule "gt" when $x : X(v > 1.5) then insert(new Hit("gt", $x.getV())); end
rule "eqf" when $x : X(v == 2.5) then insert(new Hit("eqf", $x.getV())); end
rule "le" when $x : X(v <= -0.5) then insert(new Hit("le", $x.getV())); end
rule "nez" when $x : X(v != 0.0) then insert(new Hit("nez", $x.getV())); end
rule "geint" when $x : X(v >= 2) then insert(new Hit("geint", $x.getV())); end
